content_body:
Dear Owners, 

Thank you so much for letting my new husband and I stay in your lovely cabin. We came to stay in Blue Ridge for our honeymoon and we were not disappointed! The first night we were here we sat outside in the rocking chairs to enjoy the stars. Not only did we see fireflies, but a shooting star as well! We enjoyed so many places while we were here. We rode horses, went ziplining, and got couples massages. Our last day here it rained pretty steady all day, but at the end we saw a rainbow right outside in the mountains. Thank you for making our honeymoon memorable with such a great place to stay. We will be back!! :) Mr. and Mrs. Simmons
title: Thank You For Making Our Honeymoon So Special!
